primary_complaint: Bilateral knee pain, right worse than left
functional_limitations: Cannot use stairs without hand rail
Pain limits ability to demonstrate drills as volunteer coach

imaging_findings.key_findings: X-ray (02/15/2025): Right knee: Severe tricompartmental osteoarthritis with bone-on-bone medial compartment involvement, Kellgren-Lawrence Grade IV, varus deformity 8 degrees. Left knee: Moderate OA, KL Grade III, less severe than right.

surgical_approach_if_mentioned: Anterior approach. Will perform standard primary TKA.

denial_risk_flags.label: Cortisone Injection Dates Undocumented
denial_risk_flags.explanation: The two corticosteroid injections are dated only as 'approx 2023, exact date unclear,' which does not meet payer documentation standards requiring specific dates for each injection to verify conservative care timeline.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Obtain and document exact dates for both cortisone injections from the administering provider's records or pharmacy records, and add a chart addendum specifying the precise dates.

denial_risk_flags.label: Corticosteroid Injection Count May Be Insufficient
denial_risk_flags.explanation: Only 2 cortisone injections are documented, and Aetna PPO may require documentation of a minimum number of injection attempts with specific dates and response details before approving CPT 27447.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Document the exact dates, dosage, and clinical response for each injection attempt, and confirm whether additional injection trials are required under Aetna's TKA criteria.
denial_risk_flags.anchorText: Cortisone shots x2 in right knee

denial_risk_flags.label: Physical Therapy Duration at Minimum Threshold
denial_risk_flags.explanation: Physical therapy is documented at exactly 6 weeks, which is at the lower boundary of many payer requirements (typically 6–8 weeks minimum). Aetna PPO may require documentation of specific session counts, functional outcome measures at start and end, and a formal discharge summary.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Obtain PT records from Lakeside Rehab documenting session frequency, functional outcomes at intake and discharge, and a formal statement of treatment failure to substantiate the 6-week course.
denial_risk_flags.anchorText: PT at Lakeside Rehab for 6 weeks

denial_risk_flags.label: Hyaluronic Acid Injection Duration Not Documented
denial_risk_flags.explanation: The Synvisc-One injection dated 06/2024 lacks documentation of the follow-up period used to assess benefit, which payers may require to confirm adequate trial duration before approving surgical intervention.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Add a chart note specifying the follow-up interval after the 06/2024 Synvisc-One injection and the clinical basis for determining minimal benefit.
denial_risk_flags.anchorText: Synvisc-One hyaluronic acid injection right knee 06/2024

denial_risk_flags.label: BMI 34.2 May Trigger Payer Weight Review
denial_risk_flags.explanation: A BMI of 34.2 may prompt Aetna to request documentation that weight optimization was discussed or attempted prior to elective TKA, as some payers apply BMI thresholds (typically 35–40) for additional review.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Document in the chart that BMI was discussed with the patient, that weight management was addressed, and that the clinical decision to proceed was made with full consideration of surgical risk.

denial_risk_flags.label: ASA III Comorbidities Require Clearance Documentation
denial_risk_flags.explanation: The patient carries ASA III status with HTN, T2DM (A1c 7.1), and OSA on CPAP. Aetna PPO may require documented medical clearance from the patient's primary care or relevant specialists confirming optimization of these conditions prior to elective surgery.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Obtain and attach pre-operative medical clearance letters from the managing providers for HTN, T2DM, and OSA, confirming the patient is medically optimized for elective TKA.

diagnosis_codes.note: M17.11 (primary OA right knee) is a clinically appropriate and specific ICD-10 code that directly supports medical necessity for CPT 27447 right total knee arthroplasty.

conservative_treatment_duration.note: 1 of 2 duration-eligible treatments have an explicit numeric duration (50%). Meets the 50% threshold.

surgical_approach.note: The chart explicitly documents 'Anterior approach. Will perform standard primary TKA,' which is a specific and procedure-appropriate technique for CPT 27447.

cpt_code_valid.note: CPT 27447 is a recognized orthopedic surgical code.
